about.title: About PEVALIT
about.intro: PEVALIT is focused on additive concentrate and compound solutions for manufacturers that require technical consistency and practical support.

sections.heading: What we do
sections.body: We formulate and supply masterbatch and additive systems that help customers improve process stability, surface performance, and product functionality.

sections.heading: How we work
sections.body: Our approach combines product development, quality control, and application-oriented guidance to reduce trial time and production risk.

qualityPolicy.title: Quality Policy
qualityPolicy.intro: Quality at PEVALIT is defined by repeatable performance, controlled processes, and responsive customer support.
points: Maintain consistent raw material and production controls.
Continuously improve products based on technical feedback.
Deliver transparent technical documentation and support.
Build long-term trust through reliable service and communication.
